name: ai-patient-sim-core-services
description: Core microservices for AI Patient Simulation Platform

scripts.install-all: npm run install:user && npm run install:simulation && npm run install:clinical
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:simulation" "npm run dev:clinical"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:user" "npm run start:simulation" "npm run start:clinical"
scripts.test: npm run test:user && npm run test:simulation && npm run test:clinical

author: Your Name
